args.description: Skip the bundle-based TCC auto-relaunch and stay in-process.
args.name: --no-daemon-relaunch

args.description: Override the daemon proxy UDS path.
args.name: --socket

args.description: Select the Claude Code computer-use compat tool surface.
args.name: --claude-code-computer-use-compat

args.description: Run embedded inside a host app: inherit the host's TCC grants, never prompt or relaunch. Also CUA_DRIVER_EMBEDDED=1.
args.name: --embedded

args.description: Advisory host bundle id label echoed in check_permissions output.
args.name: --host-bundle-id

subcommands.description: Run the MCP JSON-RPC server over stdio (the default invocation).
subcommands.name: mcp

args.description: Skip the macOS TCC first-launch gate.
args.name: --no-permissions-gate

args.description: Forwarded by the MCP proxy when the client asked for the compat surface.
args.name: --claude-code-computer-use-compat

args.description: Run embedded inside a host app: inherit the host's TCC grants, never prompt or relaunch. Also CUA_DRIVER_EMBEDDED=1.
args.name: --embedded

args.description: Advisory host bundle id label echoed in check_permissions output.
args.name: --host-bundle-id

subcommands.description: Run the long-lived daemon — backs the proxy/auto-relaunch path on macOS and the autostart Session 1+ daemon on Windows.
subcommands.name: serve

subcommands.description: Stop a running daemon by sending it a shutdown request.
subcommands.name: stop

subcommands.description: Print the canonical tool name + one-line summary for every registered MCP tool.
subcommands.name: list-tools

subcommands.description: Print a single tool's full description + JSON input schema.
subcommands.name: describe

args.description: Tool input JSON (or read from stdin).
args.name: json-args

args.description: Write image content to this path instead of emitting base64.
args.name: --screenshot-out-file

args.description: Override the daemon socket path used by the in-process forwarding fallback.
args.name: --socket

subcommands.description: Invoke a single tool one-shot — proxies to a running daemon when one is up, otherwise runs in-process.
subcommands.name: call

args.description: One of: claude, codex, cursor, hermes, antigravity, openclaw, opencode, pi, qwen, droid, zcode. Omit for the generic snippet.
args.name: --client

subcommands.description: Print the MCP server config snippet or a client-specific install command.
subcommands.name: mcp-config

subcommands.description: Emit this machine-readable description of the CLI surface.
subcommands.name: manifest

args.description: One of: start, stop, status, render. Default: status.
args.name: subcommand

subcommands.description: Recording sub-API: start | stop | status | render.
subcommands.name: recording

subcommands.description: Dump every registered tool's docs as one document (markdown by default, JSON with --type json).
subcommands.name: dump-docs

subcommands.description: Check GitHub for a newer release; with --apply, download and install via the canonical installer.
subcommands.name: update

subcommands.description: Read-only release-check verb (mirror of the check_for_update MCP tool).
subcommands.name: check-update

subcommands.description: Self-diagnose probes for runtime prerequisites (permissions, accessibility, capture, etc.).
subcommands.name: doctor

subcommands.description: Emit a developer-focused diagnostic dump suitable for bug reports.
subcommands.name: diagnose

subcommands.description: Read / write the persistent driver config.
subcommands.name: config

subcommands.description: Platform-native auto-start so `cua-driver serve` comes up on every logon.
subcommands.name: autostart

args.description: install | update | uninstall | status | path. Default: status.
args.name: subcommand

subcommands.description: Manage the cua-driver agent skill pack (install / update / uninstall / status / path).
subcommands.name: skills
